channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S.-Iran peace deal emerging, while war threats still loom
item.description: President Trump and other administration officials are tempering expectations raised of an imminent agreement to end the war in Iran while Iranian off...

item.title: 'My body carried me,' Elizabeth Smart says. Now she's celebrating it
item.description: Her abduction at age 14 drew international attention. After her rescue, Smart says she struggled with feeling shame around her body. Bodybuilding has ...

item.title: As diners stay home, a restaurant introduces pay-what-you-want pricing
item.description: With fewer Americans eating out, one restaurant now lets customers choose their own price for meals.

item.title: A major university system adopts AI, but students and faculty remain skeptical
item.description: California State University's embrace of AI reveals tensions when an institution pushes technology its community questions.
